items.name_en: YSL Crocodile Grain Card Holder in stock, ordered for HK$3100. A super practical piece. Small but very spacious, it holds large bills and coins can be placed in the zip pocket! The most thoughtful feature is the ID card slot that is visible. In short, a must-have super practical item for everyone. Calfskin + Sheepskin. Full set of counter packaging.

items.name_en: YSL Liya Retro Duffel/Baguette Bag
items.name_cn:
YSL Liya Retro Duffel/Baguette Bag
This year I love this retro feel!
The latest LIYA bowling bag meets all large-capacity travel needs, excellent functionality! The size design suits sisters of different heights, embodying a lazy look for autumn and winter. Simple design with an adjustable strap, easy to match. Soft and delicate leather, combining style and practicality. Fashionable sisters don't miss out!
Size: 31x16x13cm

YSL Liya Retro Duffel/Baguette Bag
This year I love this retro feel!
The latest LIYA bowling bag meets all large-capacity travel needs, excellent functionality! The size design suits sisters of different heights, embodying a lazy look for autumn and winter. Simple design with an adjustable strap, easy to match. Soft and delicate leather, combining style and practicality. Fashionable sisters don't miss out!
Size: 31x16x13cm

items.name_en: YSL LouLou Puffer Washed Denim Bag
items.name_cn:
YSL LouLou Puffer Washed Denim Bag
This denim style has been a hit at counters this year. The washed denim feels soft and comfortable, with a chubby shape like holding a marshmallow. It has a high appearance value!
Full practicality + full retro style. It looks good and matches everything. Slightly smaller than YSL 25x17x6, Model 9009

items.name_en: YSL Monogram Caviar Envelope Bag. A super practical mini bag, the most classic style, upgraded to the highest version. 100% Italian calfskin with exquisite craftsmanship; custom metal YSL logo shows personality; flip-top design ensures security; small bag with large capacity, featuring 20 card slots, two bill compartments, two central compartments, and one zippered interior pocket. Model: S377828. Dimensions: 22x14x4cm
